interpretation: Failure probe: uses only matched charge/current/depth/topology/saturation/pile-up bins plus event-order nuisance variables; high AUC means coarse matching still leaks.
Ceiling/leakage probe: includes downstream charge and penetration observables used to define the residual weak label.
Strict leave-one-run-out run-id sentinel; unseen held-out runs collapse to the intercept.
Sample group plus event-order sentinel for run-family/rate-drift confounding.
Same HGB pipeline with shuffled training labels; should fall near chance.
Positive values favor ML; CI is stored in result.json.
